title: Tragacantha eriosphaera
taxonomy: Tragacantha eriosphaera is a species of plant in the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the genus Tragacantha, which is a group of plants commonly known as sainfoin or sainfoin clover. As a member of the Fabaceae family, Tragacantha eriosphaera is a type of legume, characterized by its fruit, which is a pod. intro:
There is not enough information available about Tragacantha eriosphaera to provide a detailed paragraph. However, based on the available information, Tragacantha eriosphaera is a plant species believed to be a synonym for Astragalus eriosphaerus, which is a type of legume.

Its bioactive constituents include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties.

The most common herbal preparations made with Tragacantha eriosphaera include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as to boost the immune system.
